summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Leads Kanban Board redesign. All backend API tests (16/16) passed and all frontend UI tests passed. The Leads page now displays as a Kanban board with 6 stage columns: Prospecto, Interesado, En Negociacion, Cliente Nuevo, Cliente Activo, Perdido. Each column has colored headers with lead counts (34 total leads). Lead cards display name, stage badge, WhatsApp, source/city/product, date, and 4 action icons (view, edit, WhatsApp, delete). Stage dropdown and drag-and-drop support verified.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (accessibility improvement opportunity)

passed_tests: Login with admin@fakulti.com / admin123 successful
GET /api/leads requires authentication (401)
GET /api/leads returns list with total, page, pages fields
GET /api/leads with limit=500 for Kanban (returns 34 leads)
Lead objects have required fields: id, name, whatsapp, funnel_stage, source
GET /api/leads?stage={stage} filter works for all 6 stages
GET /api/leads?search={term} search works (filtered to 2 results for 'Juan')
GET /api/leads?source={source} source filter works
POST /api/leads creates new lead
GET /api/leads/{id} returns single lead
PUT /api/leads/{id} updates lead data
PUT /api/leads/{id}/stage?stage={stage} changes lead stage
PUT /api/leads/{id}/stage with invalid stage returns 400
DELETE /api/leads/{id} deletes lead and returns 404 on re-fetch
Stage distribution verified: Prospecto(3), Interesado(19), En Negociacion(5), Cliente Nuevo(3), Cliente Activo(2), Perdido(2)
Frontend: Leads page loads with data-testid='leads-page'
Frontend: 6 stage columns found with data-testid='stage-column-{stage}'
Frontend: 34 lead cards rendered with data-testid='lead-card-{id}'
Frontend: View icon (eye) opens detail dialog with all lead data
Frontend: Edit icon opens pre-filled form (tested with 'Juan Perez')
Frontend: WhatsApp icon has data-testid for click handling
Frontend: Delete icon (trash) has data-testid for click handling
Frontend: Stage dropdown on each card shows 6 stage options
Frontend: Nuevo Lead button opens create dialog with empty form
Frontend: Search bar filters leads by name (2 results for 'Juan')
Frontend: Source filter dropdown works
Frontend: Lead cards have draggable='true' attribute
Frontend: Lead cards have cursor-grab CSS class
Frontend: All 6 stage columns can receive drag events
Frontend: Column headers have colored backgrounds per stage
Frontend: Column headers display lead count badges
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 34 leads from database distributed across 6 funnel stages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leads Kanban Board fully implemented and tested. The LeadsPage.jsx contains a LeadCard component for individual cards. Drag-and-drop uses native HTML5 API (draggable attribute, ondragstart, ondragover, ondrop). STAGE_CONFIG defines 6 stages with labels, colors, and backgrounds. The API supports filtering by stage, source, and search term. All CRUD operations work correctly including stage change via PUT /api/leads/{id}/stage?stage={stage}.
